Project Overview # Here is the full description of the Data Harmonization project. You can write as much text here as you want, add formulas, or link to papers.
This text will only appear when the user clicks “Learn More”, and the card will not duplicate itself at the top of this page!
summary: Developing computational methods to remove scanner-specific biases and harmonize multi-site neuroimaging datasets.
title: Data Harmonization

content: Project Overview # Here you can dive into the specifics of your Image Registration work. Detail the algorithms you are developing and specific use cases for multi-modal brain mapping.
summary: Advanced algorithms for precise spatial alignment of brain images across different subjects and modalities.
title: Image Registration

content: The Brain Mapping and NeuroImaging Lab website has officially launched.
title: BMN Lab Website is Live

content: Welcome to the BMN Lab. We develop advanced computational frameworks for Diffusion MRI and brain connectivity mapping.
title: Brain Mapping and NeuroImaging Lab

content: Stay up to date with the latest happenings at the Brain Mapping and NeuroImaging Lab.
title: News

content: We are thrilled to welcome Dulaj Dasanayake and Sumonta Nandy Amit to the Brain Mapping and NeuroImaging Lab as our newest Ph.D. students. They will be contributing to our research in computational neuroimaging and brain connectivity.
title: Dulaj and Sumonta have joined the BMN Lab

content:
The BMN Lab focuses on developing advanced computational tools to map the human brain’s structural and functional architecture.
Data Harmonization Developing computational methods to remove scanner-specific biases and harmonize multi-site neuroimaging datasets.
Learn More → Image Registration Advanced algorithms for precise spatial alignment of brain images across different subjects and modalities.
